basic_details.job_title: NIT Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Goa (NIT Goa) Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website of NIT Goa. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Goa Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: First class M.Tech. / Ph.D. (submitted/awarded) in Mechanical Engineering
qualification.details: First class M.Tech. / Ph.D. (submitted/awarded) in Mechanical Engineering.

salary_details.details: Rs. 50,000/- per month with Master's degree Rs. 70,000/- per month with Ph.D. Degree

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Goa to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
